title: Shelf Reset Game
description: A serene Montessori work-cycle coach where the win is returning one tray or shelf spot exactly as it was found.
learningGoals: Practice the complete choose, use, and return work cycle
Build order and respect for shared spaces
Finish one activity before beginning another
Reset materials so the next person finds them ready
interactionModel: tap the large done row after each real-world shelf step; timers support sustained attention, sorting, and an unhurried reset
feedbackModel: serene spoken coaching with quiet sparkle, tick, and tada SFX; celebration centers the completed reset rather than speed

modes.title: One Full Cycle
modes.skill: choose, use, reset, and return one tray

modes.title: Shelf Inspector
modes.skill: sort misplaced materials and restore shelf order

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
